== Jira Project Map

Maps local directory/file path prefixes (relative to the git root) to
Jira project keys. Used by `:JiraCreateIssue` and `:JiraCreateStory` to
determine which Jira project to file tickets in.

*Rules:* - Paths are relative to the git root (no leading `/`). - The
*longest matching prefix* wins when multiple entries match. - A
directory prefix (e.g. `docs/`) matches any file under it. - An exact
file path also works (e.g. `docs/design/payment.md`).

=== Project Map

[cols=",,",options="header",]
|===
|Path Prefix |Project Key |Notes
|`docs/` |PROJ |Default project for all docs
|===
